blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 41°F.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
